# Test Fixtures

This directory is reserved for Phase 2 and later test fixtures.

Do not commit real Excel files or real production data here. Future spreadsheet fixtures must use:

- virtual product codes, such as `SKU-DEMO-304-001`;
- virtual order numbers, such as `SO-DEMO-202607-001`;
- virtual batch numbers, such as `LOT-DEMO-001`;
- synthetic quantities and dates that cannot reveal real business volume;
- no customer names, prices, amounts, employee data, or unmasked operating data.

Phase 1 intentionally leaves this directory without Excel samples.
